output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date ?venue WHERE {
  wd:Q5680117 wdt:P198 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P155 wd:Q275940 .
  ?event wdt:P155 wd:Q318928 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?event wdt:P276 ?venue .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
